misc: If not on the course, he is probably billing clients
biography: Lassi, a formidable presence from Lakeside Golf Vammala, brings a unique blend of legal acumen and golfing prowess to the greens. With 9 appearances at the Hector Trophée, Lassi is a familiar face at the tournament.
While the coveted Hector Trophée title has remained elusive, Lassi's individual brilliance shone brightly when he secured the Victor Trophy in the past.

A lawyer by profession, Lassi's sharp mind and strategic thinking are evident both on and off the course. Known for his meticulous approach, Lassi brings a calculated intensity to every shot, a trait perhaps honed from years of navigating complex legal landscapes. When he is not on the course, one can safely assume that Lassi is busy billing clients.
Although Lassi is not participating in Hector Trophée 2026, his presence will be missed. It's always possible that there are last-minute changes to the field, however, so we might see him yet.
